title: 公馆惊魂·一九三五
synopsis: 一九三五年深秋，上海法租界沈公馆。巨贾沈万山在书房参茶毒发身亡。门窗紧闭，六位在场之人，各怀心事。今夜，谁是凶手?
styleGuide: 1935 Shanghai, realistic oil painting, warm sepia tones, vintage film grain, cinematic lighting

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1935 Shanghai mansion murder mystery, realistic oil painting, warm sepia tones, vintage film grain, cinematic lighting
